ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_title" TEXT /* Title of the survey */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey's purpose */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date when the survey was conducted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the survey (e.g., draft, active, completed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the admin user who created the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES admin_users ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey this question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* The text of the question being asked */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of the question (e.g., multiple choice, open-ended) */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the question is mandatory */,
  "branching_logic" TEXT /* JSON or text-based logic for branching questions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Range of ages included in this group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question being answered */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Age group of the respondent */,
  "response_value" TEXT /* The value of the response given by the participant */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Exact time when the response was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group the participant belongs to */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant joined the survey platform */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question analyzed */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Age group of respondents analyzed */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of respondents selecting this option */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size representing respondents in this category */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey completed */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was completed */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the participant started the survey */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the participant completed the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_logs_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_logs_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_users" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the admin user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the admin user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the admin user (e.g., manager, analyst) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the admin user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant providing feedback */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey related to the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating provided by the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)
